title: Canadian Environment Week Act
description: Canadian Environment Week Act (Canadian Environment Week Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Canadian Environment Week Act .

provisions.title: Canadian Environment Week
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in every year, the week that includes June 5 shall be kept and observed under the name of Canadian Environment Week.
